title: Apple brings natural-language automation to Shortcuts
friendlyTitle: Apple brings natural-language automation to Shortcuts
summary: Apple is adding AI-powered workflow creation to Shortcuts in iOS 27, letting users describe automations in plain language instead of manually wiring together app actions and variables.
friendlySummary: Apple is adding AI-powered workflow creation to Shortcuts in iOS 27, letting users describe automations in plain language instead of manually wiring together app actions and variables.
whyItMatters: If it works reliably, personal automation could move from power-user hobby to mainstream habit: reminders, messages, navigation, media, and app workflows assembled by description rather than by scripting.
friendlyWhyItMatters: If it works reliably, personal automation could move from power-user hobby to mainstream habit: reminders, messages, navigation, media, and app workflows assembled by description rather than by scripting.
